column1: # Val Ark - diversity-expansion model catalog (small, high-value, verified).
# Complements the big LLM/STT/TTS/VLM/image catalog in download-models.sh by
# broadening MODALITY diversity with mostly-small files (embeddings, rerankers,
# tiny VLMs, OCR, depth, segmentation, detection, audio, time-series).
#   value   intrinsic importance 0-1000 (planner derives value/byte for ordering)
#   format  gguf | onnx | repo (repo = hf download with `file` as --include glob)
#   gated   no | yes  (yes = needs HF login/license; skipped unless token+accept)
# --- Offline SETUP ASSISTANTS (small chat LLMs good at Linux/shell/setup help) ---
# High value so they fill FIRST: a new offline user can ask the box itself for
# shell commands and setup steps (run with llama.cpp, pair with the Linux ZIMs).

895|qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct-gguf|assistant|bartowski/Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-GGUF|Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf|gguf|no|986048768|assistant/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct|Tiny offline Linux/shell setup assistant — runs on any box (~1GB)

860|qwen2.5-7b-instruct-gguf|assistant|bartowski/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-GGUF|Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf|gguf|no|4683074240|assistant/qwen2.5-7b-instruct|Stronger offline assistant — great at Linux/shell + coding (~4.7GB)
# --- Text embeddings (RAG backbone; tiny, run on llama.cpp --embedding / onnxruntime) ---
# --- Tiny VLMs (need text gguf + mmproj; grab all gguf) ---
